name: k6-ecommerce-framework
description: Production-ready k6 TypeScript framework for load testing Australian eCommerce platforms

scripts.test:load:platypus-au:place-order: k6 run -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging -e ENABLE_PLACE_ORDER=true dist/tests/place-order.test.js

scripts.test:quick: k6 run -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging -e QUICK_TEST=true dist/tests/pdp-load.test.js
scripts.test:smoke: k6 run -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging -e SMOKE_TEST=true dist/tests/pdp-load.test.js
scripts.test:smoke:plp: k6 run -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging -e SMOKE_TEST=true dist/tests/plp-load.test.js
scripts.test:smoke:place-order: k6 run -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging -e SMOKE_TEST=true -e ENABLE_PLACE_ORDER=true dist/tests/place-order.test.js
scripts.test:smoke:ci: k6 run -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging -e SMOKE_TEST=true --out json=results/smoke-pdp.json dist/tests/pdp-load.test.js
scripts.test:smoke:ci:plp: k6 run -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging -e SMOKE_TEST=true --out json=results/smoke-plp.json dist/tests/plp-load.test.js

scripts.dashboard:platypus-au: k6 run --out web-dashboard --vus 50 --duration 5m -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging dist/tests/pdp-load.test.js
scripts.dashboard:skechers-au: k6 run --out web-dashboard --vus 50 --duration 5m -e SITE=skechers-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging dist/tests/pdp-load.test.js
